zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Strange於1160年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Guy le Strange32歲，母親Mary Le Strange31歲。她於1177年之前與Thomas Noell在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1221年2月22日享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Strange于1160年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲Guy le Strange32岁，母亲Mary Le Strange31岁。她于1177年之前与Thomas Noell在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1221年2月22日享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strange
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): nickname for a newcomer to a district, from Middle English strange ‘foreign’ (Old French estrange, Latin extraneus, from extra ‘outside’).

Irish (Antrim): this name is also common in Ireland, where, in addition to its English etymology, it may represent an Anglicized form of any of several Irish names containing the element gall ‘stranger’, e.g. Doyle , Gallagher .

variants.name: Stranger
meanings: English: nickname for a newcomer to an area, from Middle English stra(u)nger(e) ‘stranger, foreigner’ (Old French estrangier). Compare Strange .

variants.name: Doyle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Sean, Kieran, Seamus, Aileen, Dermot, Liam, Niall, Brennan, Brigid, Conal, Conan, Donal.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dubhghaill ‘descendant of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was used as a byname for Scandinavians, in particular to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDougall , McDowell .

variants.name: Lestrange
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Strange 1 with fused Old French definite article le.

Irish: in Ireland, adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche ‘son of Cúchoigcriche’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the borderland’. Lestrange was adopted for Mac Conchoigchríche probably due to the presence of a prominent family of Lestrange, of similar meaning, who settled in the counties of Westmeath and Offaly in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Strange was born in 1160, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Guy le Strange, was 32 and her mother, Mary Le Strange, was 31. She married Thomas Noell before 1177, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 22 February 1221, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Strange est née en 1160, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Guy le Strange, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Le Strange, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Noell avant 1177, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 février 1221, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Strange 1160 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy le Strange 32 und ihre Mutter Mary Le Strange 31. Sie hat vor 1177 in England, United Kingdom Thomas Noell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Februar 1221 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Strange è nata il nel 1160 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Guy le Strange, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mary Le Strange, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Noell prima del 1177, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 22 febbraio 1221, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Strangeが1160年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Guy le Strangeは32歳，母Mary Le Strangeは31歳であった。1177年以前にイギリスイギリスでThomas Noellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1221年2月22日に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Strange(이)가 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy le Strange(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Le Strange(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1177년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Thomas Noell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 2월 22일 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Strange nasceu em 1160, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Guy le Strange, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary Le Strange, tinha 31 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Strange родилась в 1160 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Guy le Strange было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Le Strange, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Noell перед 1177 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 февраля 1221 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Strange nació en 1160, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Guy le Strange, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary Le Strange, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Noell antes de 1177, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de febrero de 1221, a la edad de 61 años.
